name: Olive Garden Pasta with Broccoli
recipeIngredient: Fresh pasta shells, 1 lb (or Medium dry shells, 1 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta shells according to package directions.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add milk and chicken bouillon cubes, then stir vigorously with a wire whisk until the mixture barely comes to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring frequently, for 5 minutes. Keep warm.
5. Drain broccoli and chop half into 1/4-inch pieces. Set aside.
6. Heat olive oil in a large sauté pan over medium heat. Add broccoli, garlic, green onions, and mushrooms to the pan. Cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes or until mushrooms begin to turn golden.
7. Add sautéed vegetables, parsley, and Parmesan cheese to the warm sauce, stirring well.
8. Serve hot with the pasta and additional Parmesan, if desired.
